description_long: This playground is set within a fenced grassy area and features a variety of recreational amenities. A large brick wall forms one boundary, supporting a mounted basketball hoop and backboard above a painted half-court with a basketball. Adjacent to the court is a metal swing set and a rectangular sandbox with a small toy inside. Two wooden picnic tables are positioned on the grass, providing seating and gathering space. The area is enclosed by a white picket fence, and a black cylindrical trash bin is placed near the court for waste disposal. The overall layout is open and functional, designed for both active play and relaxation.
description: A fenced playground with a basketball half-court, swing set, sandbox, picnic tables, and a trash bin on a grassy surface.
description_view_0: The view shows the brick wall in the foreground, partially obscuring the playground features behind it, with picnic tables and grass visible.
description_view_1: This angle reveals the basketball court, hoop, swing set, sandbox, picnic tables, trash bin, and the white picket fence enclosing the area.
description_view_2: A direct front view displays all playground elements: basketball court, swing set, sandbox, picnic tables, trash bin, and the enclosing fence.
description_view_3: This perspective highlights the sandbox and swing set, with the basketball court and picnic tables visible, and the brick wall on the right.
